RM: 501; JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE; REPORTER: ERIC THRONE; CLERK: GARTH SAYERS. REFERRED TO THIS DEPARTMENT BY THE DEPT. OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE FOR SETTLEMENT. AN AGREEMENT FOR ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT WAS RECITED ON THE RECORD. IF DEFT. PAYS $500 AND VACATES BY 10/31/01 THEN PLTF WILL FORGIVE OTHER OUTSTANDING BACK RENT AND FILE DISMISSAL W/PREJ. IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE THE JUDGEMENT FOR POSSESSION WILL ENTER AND FULL BACK RENT MUST BE PAID. TRIAL VACATED
